content:
Character: Claire Donovan
Perception: Claire is the quiet, well-dressed woman on the third floor — always polite, always put-together, even at the mailboxes at 6 AM. Green eyes, auburn hair pulled tight, the posture of someone who was raised to sit up straight. I fixed her radiator once; she tried to pay me and looked almost confused when I said no. She works at a bank, I think. She runs every morning — I see her leaving when I'm already in the cab. She seems like someone carrying something heavy very neatly. I don't know her well, but I trust her. She's decent. That's enough for me.

I don't know her well, but I trust her. She's decent. That's enough for me.
